title: Rich Irish Chocolate Bowl
description: A molten, earthy dessert perfect for a date night, combining sushi rice and tempered chocolate in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Rinse the sushi rice under cold water until the water runs clear, then drain.
In a saucepan, combine rinsed rice and 1.5 cups water, bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove from heat, keep covered, let steam for 10 minutes.
While rice steams, melt 200 g dark chocolate over a double boiler or in a heat‑proof bowl set over simmering water, stirring until smooth.
In a small saucepan, heat 1 cup oat milk with 1 tbsp coconut oil, 1 tbsp maple syrup, and a pinch of salt until warm but not boiling.
Stir the hot oat milk into the melted chocolate until the mixture is silky and well blended.
Fluff the steamed rice with a fork, then pour the chocolate sauce over the rice, gently mixing to coat.
Transfer the mixture to a bamboo steamer basket, place in the steamer, cover, and steam for 5 minutes to warm and slightly set the chocolate.
